summary: R.7 Construction Cashflow Tab - Complete Testing. 7/7 backend tests PASSED, all frontend UI tests PASSED. New 7th tab 'Строителство' correctly visible only for finance roles (super_admin, admin, accounting) and hidden for sales. Form, KPI cards, chart, and monthly table all working correctly.

issues: 2FA notification toast overlaps with filters in top-right corner - minor visual overlap (carried over from R.6)

critical_code_review_comments: AdminDashboard.jsx: Correctly implements isFinanceVisible check for tab-construction visibility. reloadKey state properly triggers dashboard refresh after settings save.

ConstructionCashflowTab.jsx: Handles no-project case (construction-no-project), unavailable case (construction-unavailable), and full form/KPI/chart/table rendering. PUT to /admin/projects/{id} with construction_cashflow_settings works correctly.
dashboard_aggregations.py: Correctly integrates construction_cashflow from build_construction_cashflow() only when is_finance_visible=True and project_id is provided.
construction_cashflow.py: Proper calculation of rough_total_cost, full_total_cost, remaining_after_rough, monthly cashflow with status (ok/below_reserve/deficit), and alerts generation.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data. Used existing project with construction_cashflow_settings (total_rzp_area=5000, rough_cost_per_sqm=400, full_cost_per_sqm=700)
context_for_next_testing_agent: R.7 Construction Cashflow Tab fully tested. Key test points: (1) tab-construction visible ONLY for finance roles (super_admin, admin, accounting), NOT for sales, (2) Without project selected: shows construction-no-project message, (3) With project selected: shows construction-form with settings inputs, KPI cards (cc-card-rzp, cc-card-rough, cc-card-full, cc-card-rev-act14, cc-card-cash, cc-card-deficit, cc-card-credit-buffer), construction-chart, construction-table with monthly rows, (4) Save button (construction-save-btn) triggers PUT /admin/projects/{id} and reloads dashboard via reloadKey, (5) Monthly table shows status badges (ok=green, below_reserve=amber, deficit=red), (6) All 6 original tabs still work (regression passed)

verified_features.feature: Backend: GET /api/dashboard/admin/full?project_id=<id> returns construction_cashflow for admin
Backend: construction_cashflow.available=True when project has settings
Backend: Sales role has is_finance_visible=False, no construction_cashflow data
Backend: Other dashboard sections (overview, finance, sales_pipeline, etc.) still present
Frontend: tab-construction EXISTS for super_admin (7 tabs total)
Frontend: tab-construction NOT visible for sales role (6 tabs only)
Frontend: Without project: construction-no-project message shown
Frontend: With project: construction-form, KPI cards, chart, table all render
Frontend: All 7 KPI cards present (cc-card-rzp, cc-card-rough, cc-card-full, cc-card-rev-act14, cc-card-cash, cc-card-deficit, cc-card-credit-buffer)
Frontend: construction-table shows monthly rows with status badges
Regression: All 6 original tabs (Обзор, Продажби, Финанси, Календар, Клиенти, Непродадени) still work
